revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:25 شوال]] [[fa:۲۵ شوال]] [[id:25 Syawal]] [[pnb:25 شوال]] [[sd:25 شوال]] [[ur:25 شوال]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:25 شوال]] [[fa:۲۵ شوال]] [[id:25 Syawal]] [[pnb:25 شوال]] [[sd:25 شوال]] [[ur:25 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Shawwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:25 شوال]] [[fa:۲۵ شوال]] [[id:25 Syawal]] [[pnb:25 شوال]] [[sd:25 شوال]] [[ur:25 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4136129]])
revision.text:
{{Islamic Shawwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:25 شوال]] [[fa:۲۵ شوال]] [[id:25 Syawal]] [[pnb:25 شوال]] [[sd:25 شوال]] [[ur:25 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121598)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:25 شوال]][[fa:۲۵ شوال]][[id:25 Syawal]][[ms:25 Syawal]][[pnb:25 شوال]][[sd:25 شوال]][[ur:25 شوال]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Shawwal}}

'''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]
[[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Shawwal]]
[[ar:25 شوال]]
[[fa:۲۵ شوال]]
[[id:25 Syawal]]
[[pnb:25 شوال]]
[[sd:25 شوال]]
[[ur:25 شوال]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121598}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

'''Shawwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:25 شوال]] [[fa:۲۵ شوال]] [[id:25 Syawal]] [[pnb:25 شوال]] [[sd:25 شوال]] [[ur:25 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
